hero_subtitle1: Empowering Young Minds for a Brighter Future
hero_subtitle2: Excellence in Education | Nursery to Grade 12 | State Board
about_subtitle: Building a Strong Foundation for Academic Excellence and Character Development
about_p1: Prabhawati Vidyapeeth is a premier educational institution located in Sahatwar, Ballia, Uttar Pradesh, dedicated to providing quality education to students from Nursery to Grade 12.
about_p2: Multilingual teaching in Hindi, English, Sanskrit, and Urdu builds strong language skills alongside academics.
about_p3: Holistic education that fosters critical thinking, creativity, and ethical values for a changing world.
principal_msg: At Prabhawati Vidyapeeth, we nurture well-rounded individuals with strong academics and character, supported by dedicated faculty and modern infrastructure.
academics_subtitle: Comprehensive Education from Nursery to Grade 12
nursery_desc: Play-based early learning in a nurturing environment that builds curiosity and creativity.
primary_desc: Strong fundamentals with engaging teaching focused on literacy, numeracy, and personality development.
middle_desc: Core subjects with emphasis on critical thinking and study skills.
high_desc: State Board curriculum focused on conceptual understanding and practical application.
senior_desc: Advanced studies with stream options and personalized guidance for higher education and exams.
language_note: Multilingual instruction fostering linguistic diversity and cultural understanding
why_subtitle: Excellence in Education, Care, and Character Development
feature_faculty_desc: Dedicated and qualified teachers committed to student success
feature_multilingual_desc: Instruction in Hindi, English, Sanskrit, and Urdu
feature_infrastructure_desc: Well-equipped classrooms, labs, and learning facilities
feature_sports_desc: Comprehensive extracurricular programs for holistic development
feature_curriculum_desc: Quality education aligned with state board standards
feature_attention_desc: Personalized guidance for every student's growth
feature_values_desc: Focus on character building and ethical values
feature_results_desc: Consistent academic excellence and student achievements
hall_subtitle: Celebrating Academic Excellence and Student Achievements
gallery_subtitle: Glimpses of Life at Prabhawati Vidyapeeth
inquiry_desc: Contact the school office during working hours
inquiry_form: Or fill out the contact form below
contact_subtitle: We'd Love to Hear From You
updates_subtitle: Latest notices and announcements from the school.
inquiry_help_text: Use these details for admission-related support and follow-up.
footer_about: Empowering young minds with quality education and character development since establishment. Building a brighter future, one student at a time.
